mnemonics.title: Transparency Types
mnemonics.content: All Large Migrating Reptiles Relocate Constantly Foraging - Access, Location, Migration, Relocation, Replication, Concurrency, Failure

mnemonics.title: RPC Steps
mnemonics.content: Call Marshal Send (Client) → Unmarshal Call Execute (Server) → Marshal Send (Server) → Unmarshal Return (Client)
